lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only. Re-running the engine for the same date reuses the existing dated file instead of changing official picks.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Rating >= 8.0/10, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

moneyline.why: Milwaukee Brewers is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 75.5% model win probability and 8.1/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 75.5% against a 65.5% no-vig market number, a 10.1% model edge at -205. Milwaukee Brewers owns the starting pitcher edge by 30 points. Bullpen read: Adds caution. Bullpen fatigue moved this probability down 2.2 points from 77.8% (starting pitcher and team strength only) to 75.5%. Lineup check: Milwaukee Brewers is a touch below its season form (-0.024 OPS); New York Mets is swinging a hot bat (+0.092 OPS). Recent form leans against this side — noted, not modeled.
moneyline.risk: Primary caution: bullpen fatigue adds late-game caution. Recheck official news before first pitch.
